calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Saul M. Ferster, Esq. for Plaintiff: Midtown Park Corporation. Plaintiff's witness: William Talmage, was present.
Shirley Gibson, Esq. for Defendant, Deedra Lee, was present.
Parties stipulated for settlement and terms of settlement for the property of 2141 Geary Street, #107, San Francisco, were read into the record as follows:
UD back rent was agreed on a pay and stay arrangement.
Defendant agrees to trace and provide proof of purchase for money order for the months of June, September and November 2005 or pay the full back due rent in total of $1383.27 by May 31, 2006, plus any current monthly rent of $461.09. March payment is due by March 24, 2006.
If defendant provides proof of unpaid rent, plaintiff will dismiss with prejudice.
If defendant does not provide proof, the defendant must pay additional attorney fees and costs of $1800.00 in monthly installments of $100.00 starting June 15, 2006.
If defendant fails to comply with terms, plaintiff shall have judgment for possession and restitution of property upon 48 hours ex parte notice by telephone and fax to counsel and defendant.
Parties mutually waived claims against each other. Parties agreed to terms. Mr. Ferster will produce the stipulation settlement in writing. Matter is deemed settled, and trial is vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SAUL MARTIN FERSTER, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY ALLISON KEEGEN, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT DEEDRA LEE, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE; TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL PERDUE; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218/206).
